subcodes.first_line: O my beloved! I received thy recent letter and read it with unbounded joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حبیبی قد اخذت تحریرک الجدید و تلوته بفرح لیس علیه مزید
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @martyrs and martyrdom
